scripts.lint: npm run lint -w frontend-public && npm run lint -w frontend-admin
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w @gene-guidelines/ui && npm run typecheck -w @gene-guidelines/ops && npm run typecheck -w frontend-public && npm run typecheck -w frontend-admin
scripts.check:public: npm run lint -w frontend-public && npm run typecheck -w frontend-public
scripts.check:dev: npm run check:backend && npm run check:public && npm run check:ops
scripts.build:frontends: npm run build:public && npm run build:admin
